raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 3,
    "R1.7": 3,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 3
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent output names one prior work (Wang et al.) and articulates the delta, but does not map against multiple works.",
    "R1.7": "The agent flags uncertainty for specific claims (e.g., Wang et al. model citation), but does not audit every load-bearing citation.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims, but does not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set (J*(d)) without any drift.",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies potential issues with citations and literature review.",
    "RX.5": "Major rewrites are traced, but minor edits are not annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.6,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.8,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent output names one prior work (Wang et al.) and articulates the delta, but does not map against multiple works.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flags uncertainty for specific claims (e.g., Wang et al. model citation), but does not audit every load-bearing citation.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims, but does not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set (J*(d)) without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies potential issues with citations and literature review.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced, but minor edits are not annotated with source and reason.
